name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Want to Go to Jail?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Walz is scum! In order to keep things PG rated, I'll leave it at that. But I have far worse names for this authoritarian, scumbag of a Governor that we have. **WE ARE LOSING OUR REPUBLIC! Do you care?** I, personally, never consented to being ruled by one politician. In fact, I've pledge my loyalty thousands of times "to the Republic". Who is Walz to think he can erode away our long-held system of government with the swipe of a pen! Walz' newest decree tonight now makes it illegal for you to have anyone inside your home that's not from your family. Violate that unilateral order, WHICH I WILL, and you could be punished with **90 days in jail**. Own a restaurant or bar? **CLOSED** Go to the gym or make your livlihood by improving people's health and immune systems? **CLOSED** Want to get away for a movie with the spouse? **CLOSED** Want to watch your kid's hockey game? **BANNED** I can't imagine the irreparable harm that will be done to our beloved small businesses. 2020 has already been difficult for them to make ends meet. This order will be the death blow. **Walz warns us of full capacity at the hospitals. That's a real issue. In fact, that's THE issue. What the hell has he been doing for these 250 days of emergency?!** Here's what I'm worried about... A Harvard study found that nearly 1/3 of young adults have had suicidal thoughts this year. And 47% of young adults are suffering from "depressive symptoms". Walz' message to them is that they are the ones who are selfish and causing grandma to go to the hospital. Meanwhile, their survivability rate is near 100%. But Walz is forcing them to isolate?!
## Are you angry now!
**We're excited that we helped get four****democrats fired in November's election. And we can't wait til these new legislators take office in January. But quite frankly, we simply can't wait that long. We owe it to you and the business community to end this battle as soon as possible.** When Walz' extends his Emergency Powers again for 30 days, we MUST overwhelm weak-kneed Republican legislators and vulnerable Democrats with ads, phone calls and other methods. We need to pound them into submission - finally Ending Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. We can't let him get away with this anymore. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=3)
---
Did you see the news today about two prominent Democrat state senators leaving the DFL caucus? There are moves being made right now and it's important that we seize on these opportunities immediately.
**Our team knows where the pressure points are. Minnesotans have had ENOUGH of Walz' unilateral orders, so we'll have the wind at our back. But we MUST ensure that effort is focused on the legislature where we have the best opportunity to finally End Walz' Emergency Powers.**
Help us get our message to more Minnesotans and help us fund our pressure campaign. Hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans NEED to hear our message of liberty NOW. And every legislator that can be swayed must feel the pain by the time they meet again.
## [Yes, I want to STOP Governor Walz!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us expand our voice. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Staff Academy
subject: “Staff Academy gave me ‘insider’ skills and a jumpoff point.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
Staff Academy Grad Akash Kaza shares his story
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — You’ve been hearing a lot from us about how awesome Staff Academy is, but we don’t want you to just take our word for it.
That’s why we recently spoke with 2020 Staff Academy Grad Akash Kaza about his experience in the program, and the doors it opened for his career in politics. Spoiler: He got to do some pretty cool things.
---
| [](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
| [READ THE
INTERVIEW HERE](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
Staff Academy is a program for ANYONE who wants to launch their political career — whether you have some experience, like Akash, or are looking for your first break in the field. Peter, if you’re still on the fence or need a little inspiration to finish those last few items on your application, [read Akash’s story today and learn more about his experience and how it opened doors for him during the 2020 cycle.](https://t.dripemail2.)
| [READ THE
INTERVIEW HERE](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
–The Staff Academy Team
P.S. Applications for Staff Academy are due by 11:59pm ET on Sunday, November 22nd. If you don't want to miss your chance to apply for our 2021 cohort, complete your application as soon as possible. [Use this link here to start or view your application.](https://t.dripemail2.)
| [APPLY NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Suck It Up?
body:
Are you kidding me? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Suck It Up?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-j/)
Whoopi thinks conservatives like you and me just need to "suck it up." Here's what I think about that. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [T](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-d/)[he Blue Wave that Wasn't](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-h/)
The election has passed and the dust has settled, however who won the presidency is far from settled. In this week's blog, I discuss this election quagmire our country is confronting and something most mainstream media is ignoring, the Democrats' and pollster promised "blue wave" failed to materialize. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Thank You](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-o/)
Thank you for bestowing upon me the honor of representing you in Congress for another two years. This week I briefly discuss last night's election and reveal some surprising facts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Final Argument](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juiyktg-kujkulhluu-p/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming election and make my case why this will be one of the most important elections in a generation. In my race, the Ohio 1st District, will voters continue to support me, a fiscal conservative, who is pro-life, pro-police and has the experience to support our community through the pandemic - or will they support an anti-police, anti-capitalism, extreme want-to-be radical who will rubber-stamp Pelosi and AOC's laundry list of job killing Marxist policies. I would like to believe, the choice is clear! Your Republican Win Daily News Update-- Trump likley to stick around after loss, GOP wonders about his next move + Illhan Omar Calls out Trump Events [ ](https://links.republican-win.com/u/click?_t=b5dd664433cc4d52a708f3b553725fe4&_m=7aa21d8ad6d94e898c862980aa781d4f&_e=NkywsswPI-oCLQIFFXAzYMxRDUE5UN9ABtpdHv2LC9UPP52eYD4QO3tMw7OMtnQXsthHhkri9aUE7JJ1eJ42AKqtW-GTpDRq7Yz-9inbYVnsWIPRYuNFI1OB8-yD2GW5BHd4ahAHt0EpKmUrmlxgxk6aBB9AOBxpFzO-4qjXWnzebfp0AOcEnsE6qIb-TV8Cw-w-nUcp5w0RibTq3MmX5U2tYw5I-Y6NCPM9Lkk1mUl-jZFENws93HX6yOnuUw0pEOSbZSXO6DPscGVqK_XOCw%3D%3D) | |

**['Squad' member Ilhan Omar compares Trump events to 'Klan rallies'](https://links.republican-win.com/u/click?_t=b5dd664433cc4d52a708f3b553725fe4&_m=7aa21d8ad6d94e898c862980aa781d4f&_e=NkywsswPI-oCLQIFFXAzYMq_CkN7rhqeV10JSslnAgz3WHgISEeuqv2J_0szBF6EFIZf1uUS0kSqoJIf93-r3X7f5245bRiQUA8ceKDRXUk3BuEuQlEJ_VaUBHUn-AUmPIzSn5sBxZEPWnSEwBigJE8UCqOEHLtqSLsosx14s1-3wkXLzABUcd9WvzTAI7cFopexYL4nj_6apKop1tYGytjQTaVty2Ep4KItjz8AbA8ZXNgUzpmjpjYYmtdMW9D7Me-rOkot2AFwf87o88i5hJz80Gw_vswgArBGObgmOZHcI1sADza9Z3xScVGIcst1)**
Rep. Ilhan Omar, D-Minn., blasted President Trump and his supporters on Monday when she likened his political rallies to those held by the Ku Klux Klan.
Omar was speaking with The Washington Post's Jonathan Capehart, who had asked about Trump personally attacking her.
**[Read More...](https://links.republican-win.com/u/click?_t=b5dd664433cc4d52a708f3b553725fe4&_m=7aa21d8ad6d94e898c862980aa781d4f&_e=NkywsswPI-oCLQIFFXAzYMq_CkN7rhqeV10JSslnAgz3WHgISEeuqv2J_0szBF6EFIZf1uUS0kSqoJIf93-r3X7f5245bRiQUA8ceKDRXUlijsSB8b_fGzwfdal27_1l8PsPHtp7bFmTbuGbgPm4aR3d2is2w3FqNcBEkQq43n0WN7fDe8K_aXfzeLor-lF-PQTCc4Uy9LIcd0_l6nwjIT5aXZDBnEOhQb6woiCvcG71Yi8xOkY-AQFJIIrGxdjld5-_E_mdhhgvrJ8R1_QzNQqm8gBCdxmvK-009yBHjlZ6_JP_RGUrrJ437NrE05cX)**
|
---
[ ](https://links.republican-win.com/u/click?_t=b5dd664433cc4d52a708f3b553725fe4&_m=7aa21d8ad6d94e898c862980aa781d4f&_e=NkywsswPI-oCLQIFFXAzYFXgFkaLQ2J_q6QnRfWeS8Vbtm8kW8i_4noP6GbsKSB9fpxcAmUpryRjMjw_l-VLb7SuNWjPJknz0NBhERo9ZVtJGC3t5E2AAItn4tU0Me0XI4DfmD9UmWk0DKdbsnSk9eiblSuyXPXWK6zawpRROfFjLxLETdRobXLkMtTgaYZboL7Kju4dY4HeKmxfCb_YwanTnMs921gL_YrZwv72UJIrUAg0cH6hQKyNw_Yb4bsikQ-UFCR9eLhnz880fMV2zNzBDf1jDHE6XtY0a5oooqzZbXYfoOPjS2-OjDQRbK9VPZ4m8hYZOAsToyZ8P8sGu3V3gGZpFGC4NxljJvhgiULzDaSg19S_3m_YO5bRJAkEHie2DoizAqsTzua_JsD5tg%3D%3D)
**[Trump likely to stick around even after loss, leaving GOP to wonder about his next move](https://links.republican-win.com/u/click?_t=b5dd664433cc4d52a708f3b553725fe4&_m=7aa21d8ad6d94e898c862980aa781d4f&_e=NkywsswPI-oCLQIFFXAzYFXgFkaLQ2J_q6QnRfWeS8Vbtm8kW8i_4noP6GbsKSB9fpxcAmUpryRjMjw_l-VLb7SuNWjPJknz0NBhERo9ZVtJGC3t5E2AAItn4tU0Me0XI4DfmD9UmWk0DKdbsnSk9eiblSuyXPXWK6zawpRROfFjLxLETdRobXLkMtTgaYZbRmqdHTzujlLar0Osr7vaa0w9balXz15K9kANqkAYYLzP1jdJaWXXXbjmq5uDmMdmZWZcKtd21mY68cKDA-wzpOV_YxqP9_IxR-t5G0O5BLzw8xilyrYTx_7UFaGq5ARXmFrpFusdk6Nbx5Sygit9D6eXoKpqYLPI9JU-53etmsbJ4t8yMYUkM6w98vMhL8ZbmqF4t1wtmcpYdvi_KrqiGQ%3D%3D)**
President Trump isn’t going away even if all his election challenges fail and Joe Biden is sworn in as the 46th president.
That’s the conclusion of Republican operatives, who expect Trump to continue wielding his Twitter megaphone at a minimum and at least to consider a 2024 presidential campaign. They are more split on the question of what effect this will have on the party.

[Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xdittlt-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xdittlt-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,As much as the liberal media wants to anoint Joe Biden __ and _ignore the voices of 73.5 million Americans..._**the rule of law still matters in America!****That's why I'm fighting here in Wisconsin, and joining the fight down in Georgia - and I'm calling for every like-minded patriot to join me.** [Join the Fight - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xdittlt-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join the Fight - $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xdittlt-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Join the Fight - $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xdittlt-ahkdjtlkr-t/) I'm calling for ONLY LEGAL VOTES to be counted in Wisconsin, standing with President Trump in the recount of Dane and Milwaukee counties.The 5th Congressional District includes a portion of Milwaukee County, and sits between Milwaukee and Dane County, so I'll be closely involved.This is a national fight as well, which is why I decided to pitch in to support the battle in Georgia - between the recount, the Senate runoffs, and Georgia's emergence as a major tipping state, I'm proud to do my part.If you want to join Team Fitzgerald and be a part of these historic battles, I urge you to take a moment to join us - right away! -Scott Fitzgerald

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC Makes Major Investment to Save the Senate
body:
Rand Paul affiliated SuperPac to spend $2.5 million
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: November 19, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Makes Major Investment to Save the Senate
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, a Rand Paul affiliated SuperPAC dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, is committed to spending $3 million in an effort to save the Senate from falling into the hands of the Democratic Socialists in Washington. Georgia is ground zero, and the fight is for control of the Senate.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Our PAC will be executing a complete campaign which will include a seven figure TV buy as well as digital, mail, phone, and door to door expenditures. With eleven wins this cycle and over $8 million in IE spending, Protect Freedom PAC with the help of Senator Rand Paul has quickly become one of the most influential independent expenditure organizations in the country."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: TUCKER CARLSON SLAMS WARNOCK FOR ANTI-COP, ANTI-GUN, ANTI-AMERICA RHETORIC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 19, 2020 ICYMI: TUCKER CARLSON SLAMS WARNOCK FOR ANTI-COP, ANTI-GUN, ANTI-AMERICA RHETORIC
ATLANTA - Yesterday, Tucker Carlson slammed Raphael Warnock for his long history of [anti-police](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yoVKA2g_Fj02a1D-b-d2fzQPSS9c6RWJ-7gUjfEWN8k4cEWPVuyaOqaae3CSxamv1oI1HCFr69I6D_yOWWTQO1zL-PlxjdEXH2vRyVgwIjaUmtB3duPqZ4XPc35mjSTJuRLW3XuUQsLg3BmZ4F7DqUWmt--3n7bQh-w==&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==), [anti-gun](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yoZMwHiPahE53zZ_qteQDrm_LiJg1W5VECxHPCM-39jQTCKdgnKmMe2WYKTAk-46PhwZNc7SI0032Dg7aqmmVmR1vdHKXdIdt0v8Uc_Yw0O-3y4dY0r0iBJBB52thK9kqpECRWX1J3SWQmQClcDWnca0VJ1sxJ2C41kkCDLf71qgg5hqEuQ1dCAls2hS2rhRbMzF0N8UvKTqzTw0RKl3GT2I=&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==), [anti-military](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yobhymO5Ni0tsvqxmJv7xkNSRdYrTgp4t4syvYBqND4ciLzUvaJiQuyRkW3OV6HwxSnJagzIVBLnncuQO4za3MgDpxw-FvnYcsVldP_vuvY488lAEDtxvW2F3RScmHz3x0mY9xWiNVXB4f8rY8C32r7kPd5ItI5e3qsUSvQZoeFqoou_Vd0zyx-bS7kvZ4_nrSA==&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==), [anti](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yocriG7CmI7LiZMU-5LFFNK28UNmzXd6f0BKkMnz1Q3GBB9OpkuGLQwAHQr5rfWAMXqrzAW2GEksEMYJixwrWq2qW91Q7hvbDYpgvj3uU3k0Nx99FEEc4vDArZLUuXKdaCymFU3Hqz2ZD35C1a5eTHVQ=&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==)-[American](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yoSyzSXs99QX2Ux-wEkr9mQhKvr3jrwZ0XvgHmjufM6xUezqQAIbvuKxvPJ-biWJ3BJDafHV_xFQhm7mOAPbERGclhcVdzQMa_aMeIgQMPSRWiPqHJPz0JTuQS6Uwunft0fD8E5F_3xWsCjwweKJ6Tqgb7QqGANVWHw==&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==) rhetoric. As Tucker lamented, "If you're in the military, if you support the Second Amendment, if you're wrong skin color, this guy thinks you're fundamentally flawed - and those aren't our words. He said them on tape. But the Democratic Party has no problem with any of it. They vetted him - they knew what they were getting. And no matter what happens on January 5th when the runoff happens, you should know that about the Democratic Party."
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yoVMabdMv7lHbkPLAgCWVAqdYMq3G9YiZ0Jq77c_gDs_YRxINDoR__aIpu8NU-qIdJmFIDkcw1Py0j-cg47yX-pPCmrRgsWigSdZsyMsmu1DIsP44ZHfQ28j7u0X3xlTa-A==&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==) or on the photo below to watch the full segment:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoJe2--rGFs_HT6uVFTeoHBTC7Wq9CpOypvarL_7y6qi74FYun0yoVMabdMv7lHbkPLAgCWVAqdYMq3G9YiZ0Jq77c_gDs_YRxINDoR__aIpu8NU-qIdJmFIDkcw1Py0j-cg47yX-pPCmrRgsWigSdZsyMsmu1DIsP44ZHfQ28j7u0X3xlTa-A==&c=ROaIjaw2H_OOFbWULBC9vlG0or_FdY3eQhQn4xRVDGEImUmwwkw0Gw==&ch=2MveJrXm11d3e04saq1CahF-BD2LOSFbPxu8dwuz3vFbqp8DYAXbcQ==)
---
|
View the transcript below:
TUCKER CARLSON: For the past fifteen years, Warnock used his platform as a pastor to condemn the United States and the people who live here. In 2015, for example, he compared cops to "gangs" and "thugs." Watch.
RAPHAEL WARNOCK [CLIP]: So in Ferguson, police power showing up in a kind of gangster and thug mentality. You know, you can wear all kinds of colors and be a thug. You can sometimes wear the colors of the state and behave like a thug.
TUCKER CARLSON: So cops make no money, they get shot a lot, everyone hates them, they protect our families, and here he is denouncing them. No one in the Democratic Party has condemned that. They haven't said a word about it. They also said nothing about Warnock's demand that Americans repent for their "whiteness." There's nothing more racist than saying something like that. Try switching the races around if you don't believe it. But Warnock said it proudly, out loud in church back in 2016.
RAPHAEL WARNOCK [CLIP]: And if it is true that a man who has dominated the news and poisoned the discussion for months needs to repent, then it is doubly true that a nation that can produce such a man and make his vitriol go viral needs to repent. No matter what happens next month, more than a third of the nation that would go along with this has reason to be afraid. America needs to repent for its worship of whiteness.
TUCKER CARLSON: Can you imagine? It's a tax-exempt Christian church -- but listen to what he's saying. He is saying that people's skin color makes them inferior. A guy who says something like that has no place in the United States Senate. None. It's wrong. What is it about racists in the Democratic Party? They love them. They haven't said a word about it. They also have said nothing about Warnock's claim that in America, "Nobody can serve God and the military" at the same time. Democrats also haven't explained why they support Warnock's sermon against the Second Amendment and self-defense. Watch this.
RAPHAEL WARNOCK [CLIP]: Think about all of the crazy people you bump into just on the routine every week -- on your job, on the streets, some of them in church. Don't look at them. Imagine all them people with guns. And then they come up with all of these clever names -- stand your ground. No, it's not a stand your ground law, it's a shoot first law. Shoot first, ask questions later.
TUCKER CARLSON: Yeah. That's not a sermon. That's not the gospel. That's not the Christian message. This guy is a fake minister with a tax exemption. But think about the political ramifications of what he's saying. If you're in the military, if you support the Second Amendment, if you're wrong skin color, this guy thinks you're fundamentally flawed and those aren't our words. He said them on tape. But the Democratic Party has no problem with any of it. They vetted him -- they knew what they were getting. And no matter what happens on January 5th when the runoff happens, you should know that about the Democratic Party.
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Communications Director [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com)
---

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Gratitude
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_068cHwMXmwAifQM4nziOZ3XNhGmY1PtzzH_GJKlQWI=/hxyVJGts526Oufh-iniONxR58DO9MZruAyVEYjWJhwk=?refcode=111920)
| | Friend, Now that the dust has settled and we are done counting votes here in Minnesota, I wanted to reach out to you and express my sincere gratitude for all of your help protecting our House DFL Majority. This campaign provided new and unforeseen challenges and without your help, we would not have won. The House DFL Majority is excited to get back to work for Minnesotans. Together, we chose decency and elected Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House. While the severity of the COVID-19 pandemic continues to increase, we will continue to work with Governor Walz and President-elect Biden to keep Minnesotans safe. There is a lot of work still to be done to chart the right course for recovery and help Minnesotans to make ends meet during the pandemic. House DFLers won the popular vote and the majority by clear and decisive margins, however a few races will be heading for recounts. We will keep you posted on those races. In the meantime, we're ready to get back to work and build a better and safer future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_068cHwMXmwAifQM4nziOZ3XNhGmY1PtzzH_GJKlQWI=/hxyVJGts526Oufh-iniONxR58DO9MZruAyVEYjWJhwk=?refcode=111920)
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Georgia Will Decide Senate Control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
body:
[Senate Conservatives Fund]

Peter:

Conservatives across the nation are standing with President Trump
in the fight for election integrity. While the media
establishment may think they get to decide the winners of our
elections, the people in our country decide once every legal vote
is counted.

In addition to upholding our election laws, we also need to STOP
CHUCK SCHUMER AND THE DEMOCRATS FROM TAKING CONTROL OF THE
SENATE. To do that, we need to win at least one of the two Senate
runoff elections in Georgia on January 5th.

PLEASE JOIN US IN SUPPORTING SENATORS DAVID PERDUE (R-GA) AND
KELLY LOEFFLER (R-GA) WITH A SPLIT CONTRIBUTION TODAY!
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

If the Democrats take over the Senate, they will abolish the
filibuster, grant statehood to DC and Puerto Rico, and expand the
seats in our courts so they can pack them with liberal activists.

THEY WANT TO PASS THE GREEN NEW DEAL, GUN CONFISCATION, OPEN
BORDERS AND TO DEFUND THE POLICE!!

We must act now to create a conservative firewall in the Senate
to stop the liberals from destroying our country.

AND WE NEED TO SEND THE LIBERAL ESTABLISHMENT A MESSAGE. We are
disgusted by the lack of election integrity in our country and we
will do everything we can to defeat those who sit on their hands
and pretend this isn't a problem.

Voter turnout in the Georgia runoff elections will be much lower
than the presidential election, which means conservatives have an
opportunity to utterly crush the Democrats.

PLEASE DO YOUR PART AND HELP US START A RED WAVE FOR
CONSERVATIVES IN 2022 THAT STARTS IN GEORGIA.
(HTTPS://SECURE.WINRED.COM/SCF/2020-GEORGIA-RUNOFF?UTM_SOURCE=REVV&UTM_MEDIUM=EMAIL&UTM_CAMPAIGN=21AB0E90B6319E2255D18D328646288D)

Our country is too great and our freedoms are too sacred to give
up without a fight. The Democrats may think they have won, but
this isn't over and we have just gotten started!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so
much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

[Mary Vought Signature]

Mary Vought

Executive Director

Senate Conservatives Fund

RUNOFF COUNTDOWN

[motionmailapp.com]

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

[2020 Georgia Runoff Candidates]

SAVE THE SENATE
(https://secure.winred.com/scf/2020-georgia-runoff?utm_source=revv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=21ab0e90b6319e2255d18d328646288d)

Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that
promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator
Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

body:
We have an important update for you. | The Election is NOT OVER
YET. We are fighting for YOU and YOUR family every single day.

URGENT MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT
TRUMP & VICE PRESIDENT PENCE

Peter,

This is so important that
we're BOTH emailing you.

The Election is NOT OVER YET.
We are fighting for YOU and YOUR family every single day, and we
want to remind you how critical your support is to our movement's
success.

Because of YOU, we've
overcome the LIES and attacks from the Fake News media. We've
overcome OBSTRUCTION from the Radical Democrats. And, we'll
overcome VOTER FRAUD, but not without your help.

Despite challenges at every
turn, YOUR support has never wavered, which is why we're coming
to you now. It's going to take EVERY PATRIOT stepping up if we're
going to KEEP GOING and DEFEND the integrity of this Election.

This is of the utmost
importance and we can't do this without you, Peter.

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
RIGHT NOW to the Official Election Defense Fund and to increase
your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

We're counting on YOU,
Peter. With your help, we will DEFEND the Election and keep
America America.

Contribute RIGHT NOW to
PROTECT your Country and to increase your impact by 1000%.

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump and Mike
Pence

President & Vice President
of the United States

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great
Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax
purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great
Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America,
and the Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth
Ave New York, NY 10022

grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

body:
With the runoff elections in Georgia under 50 DAYS AWAY, I knew I had no choice but to reach out to you to update you on the state of the races. And, I'm afraid I don't have good news. Democrats have already poured MILLIONS into Georgia in order to buy these seats. And to make matters WORSE, Chuck Schumer, AOC, Andrew Yang, and Stacey Abrams have pledged to do WHATEVER IT TAKES to flip Georgia AND the Senate BLUE.

**FROM:** Mitch McConnell
**SUBJECT:** The Upcoming Georgia Senate Elections

With the runoff elections in Georgia under 50 DAYS AWAY, I knew I had no choice but to reach out to you to update you on the state of the races.

**And, Friend, I 'm afraid I don't have good news.** Democrats have already poured MILLIONS into Georgia in order to buy these seats. And to make matters **WORSE** , Chuck Schumer, AOC, Andrew Yang, and Stacey Abrams have pledged to do **WHATEVER IT TAKES** to flip Georgia AND the Senate BLUE.

This is where you come in, Friend. We're not going to be able to win this fight if the members of our grassroots army don't step up, [**which is why I 've activated 500% MATCHING through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018UgzuZ1ztXiTmqTOt55LAjNVbYb43OopoCBQNPX5aIjvs_Aq5b0_-y18K-YQrrflAp6SP1Uw6qm2ltsHci7F0c1EmS69rPV0oUBwQQVX48GIh2QbjmF1qwIryRSeV6bniNNY54O3oX4pPIPNMX3qHjO_ZE2iI_kN3MGWplTs4uo5iF6KX7kw7Nn3eepcMJbDxtkeY4cdehouls5C7nus_Gj5Gb_Wj0NxVpBC-pXnUxoPqdTGHmNCyI-BrPoROAZWwzIENov9Nh0k7YjNRE9MjnEnzDp_ODHKCIrSdlqvhJd9UAymYh_RQ5kTVu7-T0bC71msKfW4jb9_Jgyk-2FbOcgSbvgqWi3jhSIyokvrpTTUWk49ZixuPnq-FR-k2vDDSXgHOI0mqYVFbMN4c3oC_agu29YIFS0PYFSXvciIuQzR2Ouqx-InlQ==&c=-QmrG5K028QNOCQR0fZykh_TR6JGFfJ1txHk3_oNNqyf3pyAzAl76A==&ch=gO2cSPcNTTkGZoUGA2Bo6Hq8DPJw06MghYcHoHy8UJGLAYuEvUhooQ==)

clean_body: Control of the Senate hinges on the Georgia runoffs. Here are the options: " Friend -- Control of the Senate hinges on the Georgia runoffs. Here are the options: Option 1: Liberals Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock: two Socialists who have said Trump supporters must repent and never show our faces again, and no one can serve God and the military. Option 2: Conservatives David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler: two pro-Trump Republicans who believe in secure borders, lower taxes, and standing up for the police. Winning the Senate is the most important thing any of us will ever do. Perdue and Loeffler need our help to defeat their radical opponents. == Unless you want liberals in complete control of Congress, the time for sitting on the sidelines is over. name: Mary Mancini
subject: This is outrageous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Here’s the deal. Tennessee Covid-19 cases and deaths are skyrocketing. Tennesseans are losing jobs, struggling to pay bills, and dealing with skyrocketing medical costs. Teachers are working without basic protections and small businesses and restaurants are closing.
Republican Governor Bill Lee has the opportunity to help struggling Tennesseans. He could choose to use both state and federal money - money that disappears if we don’t spend it - on pandemic relief and unemployment. Instead, he chooses to horde it. That's millions of dollars in federal money - TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families) - he is leaving unspent.
This is just the latest reckless move by the Republicans during this crisis. From refusing to implement a statewide mask mandate to validating the dangerous lies coming from Trump and the GOP – Tennesseans deserve better.
The TNDP continues to fight because Tennesseans simply can’t afford for us to sit on the sidelines. We’re trying to raise another $7,000 this month to continue to strengthen our outreach and mobilization efforts.
If you can, please consider making a donation to the Tennessee Democratic Party right now. We need you in this fight alongside us. Thank you. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

**[**STAND WITH DAVID PERDUE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M5ilLARHbqq564xzrNTSVjpUupHG4F7NrD6_UdUXocyr7XXcmzthXurCRPrUJVln-Y0Z6GpeMB_iM-q5v2to0rx-MVLxxB8EtgC3a5r5hZ3ALp3ycqqAS0eJ4rKr-z95P-4JxiDP0LwsSgjGNEW-ik7eynviyffiW9fUKPJmmt-2ouye3HZExgIJTv6XDy47oqo8tKwim5XIKcsebXLi8Eoo3Tcmnx02N3PoMnr4xS6dG6sKX1KYV3DLmivaBc0isbVRKIAtQ2PscMslskk5qwwpfa6P0cViV7kY-2o8AGh2Pii_R10lqcwqauf17DMdEPMXJ8CFjuSEyyMdGNB5sWG7G8JZtEZUTVBMY1GPkfqohPzwDeyBqT9yv-wgNCT7EJ3jvAZRv2XBbHBvCTflp5ewZOQkCvXvDrU2bOwrUbSPzzNeqMyUvtxovn3nV_jk&c=IzuS18Ha4cKhPTDysTtPJkOxqqlatPlBSm2y-XrgmYMf3iRltHeUjw==&ch=3fsy4UAZsbA3Kd2sbQ9KcJniPM6YX0UcRFdBkIWgW2SXYHSyRpKzHg==)**

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: This is Personal to Me
body:
Peter,
Back in 1961, I was born in Atlanta, Georgia in the same neighborhood where Martin Luther King, Jr. preached.
It was there that I first heard the word of God, and where I was taught the Judeo-Christian values that have guided my life in the years since.
I share this because with Georgia’s two runoff elections just weeks away, my birth state is being buried in an avalanche of secular, progressive money and I am genuinely concerned.
Will voters of faith make their voices heard, or will they be drowned out?
[**_My Faith Votes is ready to level the playing field, but it requires your continued support and there isn’t much time. Will you donate to our Georgia runoff efforts right now?_**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201119apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201119apl01nd&n=1 "Donate Now")
In swing state after swing state, we have now seen how small the margin of victory or loss can be.
A few thousand voters could decide these runoff elections, and in doing so, they will determine the balance of power in the U.S. Senate.
Getting this right is critical for the country, but, it is also personally important to me.
[**_As we ramp up in Georgia, I would be incredibly grateful for your continued support._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201119apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201119apl01nd&n=2 "Donate Now")
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201119apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201119apl01nd&n=3)
Steadfast and Loyal,
Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201119apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201119apl01nd&n=5).

name: Tim Scott
subject: Kamala Harris could become the most powerful person in Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I know you've been hearing a lot about the Senate runoff elections in Georgia and how much is truly at stake in January. Let me try to break this down as simply as I can. If we lose the races in Georgia, that means the Senate will be tied 50-50 and the Vice President will get to cast the deciding vote on a whole host of important issues.
Friend,

I know you've been hearing a lot about the Senate runoff elections in Georgia and how much is truly at stake in January.

Let me try to break this down as simply as I can.

If we lose the races in Georgia, that means the Senate will be tied 50-50 and the Vice President will get to cast the deciding vote on a whole host of important issues.

If Joe Biden is certified as the winner of the Presidential Election: **Kamala Harris will be able to cast that tie breaking vote in the Senate.**

Kamala Harris was recently rated the most liberal Senator in 2019 by an independent analysis. That's right, _more liberal than Socialist Bernie Sanders._

[Donate Now to STOP Kamala](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/kamala-harris-cannot-be-tiebreaker/?utm_campaign=20201119_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040989-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201119_kamala-harris-could-become-the-most-powerful-person-in-washington)
---

Kamala Harris supports a total government takeover of your healthcare that will strip millions of Americans of their insurance and lead to higher costs and lower quality care.

She wants to enact the job-killing Green New Deal which will shut down industries, raise energy prices and ban fossil fuel consumption.

Kamala Harris wants to implement an extreme socialist agenda that will strip away the greatness of America.

[Donate Now to STOP Kamala](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/kamala-harris-cannot-be-tiebreaker/?utm_campaign=20201119_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1040989-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201119_kamala-harris-could-become-the-most-powerful-person-in-washington)
---

The good news is that we still have time to stop Kamala and the Democrats in Georgia.

Friend, I am counting on you to stand with me to help hold Georgia and hold the Republican Senate Majority.

Tim Scott

name: George Buck
subject: Schumer & Pelosi Could Control Everything
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

Hi Peter,

They are stealing the Presidential election. Now the Left wants to steal the U.S. Senate - and we need to fight back to "Save the Senate"!

My name is Dr. George Buck, and I am a retired firefighter and U.S. Airborne Army veteran. I am writing to you on behalf of Drain the DC Swamp PAC, which has been helping good America First conservatives like you and me in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Florida, and around the country!

I have dedicated my time and efforts to fighting for the President and his agenda - and right now we need your help!

We are in the midst of the fight of our lives - a struggles whose stakes are so high, if we lose, we may well lose the Republic.

Consider this: right now, the President is trying to make sure that all the LEGAL votes are counted.

But as he fights in the courts, there is another fight in Georgia that is just as important.

As Nancy Pelosi has had control over the House, the Senate has been the death of many bad Democrat ideas- and affirmed so many of the President's excellent judges and nominees.

Put frankly, we NEED the Senate- and we MUST have control over the Senate, especially if Biden does steal the Presidency.

If worst comes to worst- control over the Senate will be all we have to stop the radical Left.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

You've seen what nonsense AOC and the Squad have been pushing for the last two years.

You've seen her push to "defund the police", but that would only be the beginning, without a Republican Senate.

Bad ideas like endless entitlements, the Green New Deal, high taxes, Socialism.... that's our future, if we don't win BOTH of these races in Georgia.

Make no mistake, it really is THAT important. Heck, Chuck Schumer boasted of it- he will be spending $100 million on those races.

The Left is all in. That means we must meet their intensity.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

But it really stars Schumer, the Senate’s top Democrat, whose eight-word vow bookends the 30-second spot: “Now we take Georgia, then we change America.”

Schumer was filmed making those remarks on Saturday in the afterglow of President-elect Joe Biden’s victory. They play into longstanding GOP attacks in Georgia that Democrats are puppets of out-of-state interests who are too extreme for the state.

Scott, a potential presidential candidate who will soon chair the National Republican Senatorial Committee, said Schumer’s “change” would bring a vast overhaul to Washington if Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock prevail over U.S. Sens. Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. The twin runoffs will likely determine control of the Senate.

“That’s Democrat leader Chuck Schumer. You heard him: they plan to take Georgia so they can change America. Their change: Reduce funding for police, eliminate employer-based health insurance, pack the Supreme Court, chip away at our religious freedom and gun rights.”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

For years now, Drain the DC Swamp PAC has been fighting for the America First agenda. From getting out the vote for the President in Pennsylvania to electing pro-Trump conservatives in Georgia, we have put our resources toward fighting the Left- and with fantastic results!

We want to go back to Georgia to make sure we win TWO Senate races- to make sure that, if worst comes to worst, there is a check on Joe Biden's worst impulses.

We want to make sure that exactly ZERO of AOC's bad ideas ever becomes law.

We want to protect your Constitutionally protected rights, but we can't do that if Chuck Schumer gets control over the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg
- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

We have come so far with the America First agenda. We can't turn back now! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=th5IQp.gG6gP08YUHPZy5g

George Buck Phd

Airborne Veteran and Firefighter

Conservative

P.S. Our nation is in crisis. Socialists control the House of Representatives, they want to pack the Supreme Court, and the Presidency is going through litigation and recounts. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gc4lK.9UKrcqI4c&b=3ONUfKicg12U3A5VWNeaDg
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:
https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcjIwM7Ozs

subject: Singh Rejects Murphy's Fear-Mongering; Urges New Jersey to Celebrate Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
"Tyrannical Phil Murphy has no right and no authority to cancel Thanksgiving or meddle in the Thanksgiving plans of New Jersey families," Singh said. | | | Dear Friend,

The radical left has finally lost it. More specifically, Tyrannical Phil Murphy has finally lost it.

It's not enough that we must be silenced (while they slander us). It's not enough that we must be disarmed (while they enjoy their security details). No, now we also can't see our loved ones.

Nothing gets me riled up more than corruption, but corruption that's designed to separate families during Thanksgiving? It would seem that Phil Murphy's hypocrisy knows no limits.

Well holiday or not, I won't stop fighting to restore New Jersey for the people. Phil Murphy can take his little shutdown and can it — I'll be with my family next week, eating turkey and laughing it up. I hope you will be too.

Take a moment to check out my team's press release below. It's only a sliver of what's in store for Tyrannical Phil Murphy. If you are able; help me fight with any contribution you can afford.

— Hirsh

# Singh Rejects Murphy's Fear-Mongering; Urges New Jersey to Celebrate Thanksgiving

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Conservative outsider, anti-establishment leader, and gubernatorial candidate Hirsh Singh today rejected Tyrannical Phil Murphy's new shutdown order canceling Thanksgiving for millions of New Jerseyans.

"Tyrannical Phil Murphy has no right and no authority to cancel Thanksgiving or meddle in the Thanksgiving plans of New Jersey families," Singh said.

In making his comments, Singh cited the unifying principle of recognizing a national day of thanks every year since the Civil War.

"It was President Lincoln who saw fit to proclaim a national day of Thanksgiving ending disparate thanksgiving celebrations on different days in different states," Singh said. "President Trump will once again proclaim the last Thursday in November to be our shared, national day of Thanksgiving. All Americans -- including New Jerseyans -- will come together with family, friends, and neighbors to celebrate our common appreciation for 'the gracious gifts of The Most High God' -- as Lincoln said -- at a time when a little national unity would do our country well.

"Phil Murphy's fear-mongering and insatiable appetite for central-planning cannot, should not and will not stop that."
---

body:
Friend, We aren't done.
The radical left isn't done.
The fight to take over the U.S. Senate continues with two runoff races in Georgia. And they will never give up the fight to force their radical agenda on Americans.
**[I need to know that you're ready to fight back that you'll never give up the fight!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UyS4To4uWh2VjyRJETKLcKsRkttRLoS7uORVWb-NieKaAqgcTS1HdHMq_YeWzl2GseLyLB1Ah936YKOUtf0kGIjHb3q0paWCsY1TuYh153tzrnc5ZbxR1l73_Iw0ZzkX7Jh_IDPeAy6MUiZv07qhmDAgpdSDUJjk3TwLy6_mwjQgibarANAC6-HhO9hX4ovpq2y7lGn4B7SCd1yfjKb8SWqWCUM_0LTVTZWbsPZurmVVfvinmxKbW9Uz4UpweMqW6Owl6N8aIxs4oqOBsP1ObWh_e-oIryuNfTv4mRzk3oxORMj32toDpWO-spsQ0Ig7QO5AkMlF2QQs_Lf70wLTF9_uPXsuqLd&c=IWM1T149YFuUGRNc6R9VnpYR-_rOQsogXwMzIvFLSIoLc4FYN8r7TA==&ch=suwgW-C4GijYrRnw1qJ9K9Wydq9QSrxsyfzN6bVDalxS3E5eLJKT_Q==)** [**Sign the card to show your support for the Republican majority >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UyS4To4uWh2VjyRJETKLcKsRkttRLoS7uORVWb-NieKaAqgcTS1HdHMq_YeWzl2GseLyLB1Ah936YKOUtf0kGIjHb3q0paWCsY1TuYh153tzrnc5ZbxR1l73_Iw0ZzkX7Jh_IDPeAy6MUiZv07qhmDAgpdSDUJjk3TwLy6_mwjQgibarANAC6-HhO9hX4ovpq2y7lGn4B7SCd1yfjKb8SWqWCUM_0LTVTZWbsPZurmVVfvinmxKbW9Uz4UpweMqW6Owl6N8aIxs4oqOBsP1ObWh_e-oIryuNfTv4mRzk3oxORMj32toDpWO-spsQ0Ig7QO5AkMlF2QQs_Lf70wLTMnULIIgORgM&c=IWM1T149YFuUGRNc6R9VnpYR-_rOQsogXwMzIvFLSIoLc4FYN8r7TA==&ch=suwgW-C4GijYrRnw1qJ9K9Wydq9QSrxsyfzN6bVDalxS3E5eLJKT_Q==) Keeping the Senate out of Democratic hands is critical to enacting our conservative agenda and restraining the most radical elements of the left.
These next few months will be critical for our nation and with supporters like you we will have the strong backing we need to continue to promote our agenda.
\- Rob Portman
\-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, Maintaining Republican control of the Senate is critical to reining in the most radical members of the Democratic party.
And Friend, our fight is not yet over.
Control of the Senate continues to hang in the balance with two runoff races in Georgia **[so I need to know that YOU are up for the fight to keep it.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UyS4To4uWh2VjyRJETKLcKsRkttRLoS7uORVWb-NieKaAqgcTS1HdHMq_YeWzl2GseLyLB1Ah936YKOUtf0kGIjHb3q0paWCsY1TuYh153tzrnc5ZbxR1l73_Iw0ZzkX7Jh_IDPeAy6MUiZv07qhmDAgpdSDUJjk3TwLy6_mwjQgibarANAC6-HhO9hX4ovpq2y7lGn4B7SCd1yfjKb8SWqWCUM_0LTVTZWbsPZurmVVfvinmxKbW9Uz4UpweMqW6Owl6N8aIxs4oqOBsP1ObWh_e-oIryuNfTv4mRzk3oxORMj32toDpWO-spsQ0Ig7QO5AkMlF2QQs_Lf70wLTDEmZhkwPwNm&c=IWM1T149YFuUGRNc6R9VnpYR-_rOQsogXwMzIvFLSIoLc4FYN8r7TA==&ch=suwgW-C4GijYrRnw1qJ9K9Wydq9QSrxsyfzN6bVDalxS3E5eLJKT_Q==)**
**[Will you sign our card to show that you're all-in to defend our Republican majority?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UyS4To4uWh2VjyRJETKLcKsRkttRLoS7uORVWb-NieKaAqgcTS1HdHMq_YeWzl2GseLyLB1Ah936YKOUtf0kGIjHb3q0paWCsY1TuYh153tzrnc5ZbxR1l73_Iw0ZzkX7Jh_IDPeAy6MUiZv07qhmDAgpdSDUJjk3TwLy6_mwjQgibarANAC6-HhO9hX4ovpq2y7lGn4B7SCd1yfjKb8SWqWCUM_0LTVTZWbsPZurmVVfvinmxKbW9Uz4UpweMqW6Owl6N8aIxs4oqOBsP1ObWh_e-oIryuNfTv4mRzk3oxORMj32toDpWO-spsQ0Ig7QO5AkMlF2QQs_Lf70wLTJrdepDky3Go&c=IWM1T149YFuUGRNc6R9VnpYR-_rOQsogXwMzIvFLSIoLc4FYN8r7TA==&ch=suwgW-C4GijYrRnw1qJ9K9Wydq9QSrxsyfzN6bVDalxS3E5eLJKT_Q==) **
Americans always have a choice: a Senate that would rubber-stamp higher taxes on middle-class families, enact job-killing regulations, and support government-run health care OR a Senate that would stand up for small business owners, middle-class families and the men and women in law enforcement.
We must continue to make one thing loud and clear that the American people are AGAINST a Schumer-controlled Senate. [**Sign the card to show your support for the Republican majority >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016UyS4To4uWh2VjyRJETKLcKsRkttRLoS7uORVWb-NieKaAqgcTS1HdHMq_YeWzl2GseLyLB1Ah936YKOUtf0kGIjHb3q0paWCsY1TuYh153tzrnc5ZbxR1l73_Iw0ZzkX7Jh_IDPeAy6MUiZv07qhmDAgpdSDUJjk3TwLy6_mwjQgibarANAC6-HhO9hX4ovpq2y7lGn4B7SCd1yfjKb8SWqWCUM_0LTVTZWbsPZurmVVfvinmxKbW9Uz4UpweMqW6Owl6N8aIxs4oqOBsP1ObWh_e-oIryuNfTv4mRzk3oxORMj32toDpWO-spsQ0Ig7QO5AkMlF2QQs_Lf70wLTCB9bW4QF7lW&c=IWM1T149YFuUGRNc6R9VnpYR-_rOQsogXwMzIvFLSIoLc4FYN8r7TA==&ch=suwgW-C4GijYrRnw1qJ9K9Wydq9QSrxsyfzN6bVDalxS3E5eLJKT_Q==) \- Rob Portman Paid for by Promoting our Republican Team PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidates' committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Senator Joni Ernst Op-Ed: We’re At A Critical Crossroads In Our Great Nation
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/feda747c60d2/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66271?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| **Senator Joni Ernst: We’re At A Critical Crossroads In Our Great Nation** _"David and Kelly’s radical, liberal opponents want to take this country in a very different direction."_
---
| Folks - Today, Senator Joni Ernst of Iowa, a 23-year combat veteran of the U.S. Army Reserves and National Guard, published an op-ed on FoxNews.com highlighting the high stakes in the January runoff elections and the need for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler's continued leadership for Georgia. Senator Ernst explains that if we defend the Republican majority, our nation will continue to be “a beacon of hope and freedom for people around this globe.”
**Read Senator Ernst’s full op-ed for _Fox News_ [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=75e710b929&e=02cd889ad3) and below.**

---
|
---
| _The stakes are high. You’re going to hear that a lot from now until January 5. But it’s the truth—the future of our country hangs in the balance._ _ _ _I see these two Senate elections in Georgia through the eyes of someone who served 23 years in the Army Reserves and National Guard. My military career began after coming home from an agriculture exchange program to socialist Ukraine. The first question I was asked during my visit: what’s it like to be an American? You see, there was no such thing as freedom and liberty in the Soviet Union. And these folks, they wanted to be free. That reality made me appreciate in clear terms just how critical it is to defend the freedoms and liberties we enjoy, and often take for granted, as Americans. It started a fire in me to serve; to not just sit on the sidelines, but to fight to defend America and her way of life._ _ _ _Right now, we’re at a critical crossroads in our great nation. The majority in the Senate is up for grabs, and the choice could not be clearer. Do we want the government to take control of our lives, to raise our taxes, and to fundamentally change our country? Or do we want to maintain our individual rights and liberty, keep more of our hard-earned dollars, and get Washington off our backs?_ _ _ _David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler are on the path of freedom, opportunity, and prosperity. They believe in the America I’ve fought for and they want to preserve this path. We need them in the Senate to push back on these radical far-left ideas. New York Senator Chuck Schumer, the Democratic leader in the Senate, has already said the quiet part out loud: “we take Georgia, and then we change America.” That’s exactly what will happen if we don’t hold the line in the Senate and re-elect David and Kelly._ _ _ _I’ve had the opportunity to work closely with David. I know he deeply cares about Georgians and making sure the federal government doesn’t overstep or get in the way of opportunity and economic growth. He’s worked in international business and has seen the harmful effects of other forms of government, like Communist China. Like me, David works across the aisle and has delivered bipartisan results for Georgians. We work together on the Senate Armed Services Committee to fight for our servicemembers, to get them the first pay raise in nearly a decade, and to help hold our adversaries, like China, accountable._ _ _ _Kelly and I both grew up on a farm. We were 4-H girls. We both work on the Senate Agriculture Committee, fighting to make sure our farmers and producers aren’t stifled by Washington regulation and can continue feeding and fueling our world. I was grateful to stand by Kelly’s side as she was sworn into the Senate by our Vice President, Mike Pence. Kelly truly is a wonderful role model for conservative women – proving that they can be successful not only in business but in elected office. We need her voice in the Senate._ _ _ _On the other hand, David’s and Kelly’s radical, liberal opponents want to take this country in a very different direction. If given power in the Senate, Democrats will take the United States of America down a dark path...a path that could echo the socialism that I witnessed in Ukraine many years ago._ _ _ _Our nation has always been a beacon of hope and freedom for people around this globe. And with David and Kelly in the Senate—with conservative leadership—we can continue to be._ _ _ _Take it from this combat veteran: America is worth fighting for. So Georgians, I’m asking you to step up and fight. Help us hold the line in the Senate. Let’s keep America the greatest, freest nation on the face of the planet._
###

name: President Trump and Vice President Pence
subject: Read this

body:
We have an important update for you. | The Election is NOT OVER
YET. We are fighting for YOU and YOUR family every single day.

URGENT MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT
TRUMP & VICE PRESIDENT PENCE

Peter,

This is so important that
we're BOTH emailing you.

The Election is NOT OVER YET.
We are fighting for YOU and YOUR family every single day, and we
want to remind you how critical your support is to our movement's
success.

Because of YOU, we've
overcome the LIES and attacks from the Fake News media. We've
overcome OBSTRUCTION from the Radical Democrats. And, we'll
overcome VOTER FRAUD, but not without your help.

Despite challenges at every
turn, YOUR support has never wavered, which is why we're coming
to you now. It's going to take EVERY PATRIOT stepping up if we're
going to KEEP GOING and DEFEND the integrity of this Election.

This is of the utmost
importance and we can't do this without you, Peter.

Please contribute ANY AMOUNT
RIGHT NOW to the Official Election Defense Fund and to increase
your impact by 1000%. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

We're counting on YOU,
Peter. With your help, we will DEFEND the Election and keep
America America.

Contribute RIGHT NOW to
PROTECT your Country and to increase your impact by 1000%.

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump and Mike
Pence

President & Vice President
of the United States

CONTRIBUTE $45 = $495

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great
Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax
purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great
Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and
composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America,
and the Republican National Committee.

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth
Ave New York, NY 10022

We believe this is an important way to reach our
grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information
regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again
Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team.
It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make
America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you
for all that you do!

name: Rob Portman
subject: FW: We’re not done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate
body:
I was hoping to see your name on the list of patriots who stepped up to save our Senate majority... Maybe you missed my last email? Peter, I was hoping to see your name on the list of patriots who stepped up to save our Senate majority... Maybe you missed my last email? While November 3 is behind us, I assure you, the battle over control of the Senate is not over. Runoff elections, massive attacks from the Radical Left... It’s all on the table and we need to be ready. **[I had at least $20 marked down next to your name... I was hoping you’d come through to help defend our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate.](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuS5f99dyWEsRagUnVbFiryY9FBS03PSa0KFzAdxIxsKyUSI7cnUO9bzHefv46PN063H1U6scwFFgKyQL2zsHMO_BZ19SxF-6ugHUCFXiXSw5vFQUmjXJJkYnUpqmacwNomquVLhqFaGrfyXpXIZgYIWD1rsZ2N7ydHAh29DCS_Oz8NkjpLltAsvxOrQ5Baak7GXza6y7HmAj9_TBpkJLKc4SYhGkkfgrHtYJ6vTTcvvpAYSw3P7UbTOcy8TPz4a-hQnTMDbyyA8irRciuaUE8Zi5pruGI4Q-w-JeQQUpqhPh8sA5Vhn61o8glwvmqGjkgsBmbsbnjwAtxe0FXbZ5tjnt427eP38RICOXKxzB7Xp7w9TVgZVNIBdSR3r8RqcLOXx4Bu3e7AEweNrIEiCOH5Cg%3D%3D)** **[Can I count on you?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuShBGFoiSICcVrHxrsNFIWetg7r7r7Hvpx3ti7H3w2sH60bHX4mFerRyVhTGF_ApdfiUl9xnJM-I5d0cRZT9yHCGHS7RHGHShAKJvLD_2YqPsnWcyS9Rp9mDuyOO4EpQhYUGvx1TXRfWQISS8o9BKFjQqIn-FYP0zuFD6GcBhSBb9-ETktjh4lNE6wt20DymK86RliynSuImn4CJW35l9Q2vRFDS6msbdRZ1qsCjkaVL_GqWfa-8Oy2TH43i6SgjEMfa07XrWflU1LHYFeAFLmbdVkwG9qdQwrNVxHbDZVZdpExkpTcwQeB8XSpjPsuR1hRUSGnggim07d-oCsaVZwSCaFk0JjZP_uNo-oWffK7j0XhhPjZw6rCVuTzgnmESvA)** –Rob Portman \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Peter, You might think the 2020 Election is over...
Think again.
As tumultuous as it has been, we are far from over.
A lot is up in the air. Two of my Senate colleagues from Georgia will be heading to runoff elections which could cancel out our GOP majority. Control of the Senate hangs in the balance. The radical left will continue to pour dark money into their states to chip away at our majority.
They’re not going to stop until they take back this majority, Peter.
That’s why I’m coming to you for help.
You’ve proven yourself to be a reliable GOP supporter time and time again... I’m coming to you today to stress that your job is not done. There are still Republicans in great need of help.
In the coming months, I’m going to do everything I can to defend our majority, but I need YOU to help me with that. **[Will you chip in $25 now to help fight all of our new battles to keep the Senate red?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuS8B-TAfda2r49_Hk0_dhJ1k1ioxl2nnmoL_wwhexr32VFnDnv_0ioFQrZaB9eCMQu8XrmMjO45cMJExOikrX8V5KNVqgN7VVl93ah3HILRyGHJLkzIRajgDeTI5hxBEsXLsIoSyv03Rtrau5YpK7fQcPZa9e3jmFN8EKYwj5bIoZXKIerTb1ousQ4ESqd4_g5y7YDoW_xgASUQbLCt9dJx4vnWZsSi_5oMf5xHeNW6KUoG_tq0jpeMKb-dPB7nRhpef6ykNiGurJMkVY3vuE4-bf3gEXT_B3FhTEiPNAcf2NfKuZIJnGERhEtA1D5SEuM4Lp836Iio1V5mR-vVjo19Nc_JsB1QyAu4oEzLC9jnucmvC9rwoEKpqnhzrqaOOAvi5J8Jo0zom9ftFPucFZmxQ%3D%3D)** [**DEFEND THE MAJORITY**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuShBGFoiSICcVrHxrsNFIWetg7r7r7Hvpx3ti7H3w2sH60bHX4mFerRyVhTGF_ApdfiUl9xnJM-I5d0cRZT9yHCGHS7RHGHShAKJvLD_2YqPsnWcyS9Rp9mDuyOO4EpQhYUGvx1TXRfWQISS8o9BKFjXk1EALiOFyrDb1tsG5sXrXEwNm5FNE5tX0N5d_a-iO9xVwVsRhE-6HO8S9_0BKWtheOg5L94kG_QUtE6oQkdCfKO1ng7YpuEjd_fQnhPfu-Ft3V4ZaqAoXE8BaU9wqYAU8P-8PACD4XZiMf1ZV5Nx7MVLcG1-QYt9kAzIf7wZC-8I5dpiqkRBrEJfnT6YPKeggIj_AWLfDIepoBAEDhDUmYCojGyNJyBQchlCJNEni0) [**KEEP UP THE FIGHT**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuShBGFoiSICcVrHxrsNFIWetg7r7r7Hvpx3ti7H3w2sH60bHX4mFerRyVhTGF_ApdfiUl9xnJM-I5d0cRZT9yHCGHS7RHGHShAKJvLD_2YqPsnWcyS9Rp9mDuyOO4EpQhYUGvx1TXRfWQISS8o9BKFjWigVrvYXjkOMu0MfewuwLEvZmEbMVQ2Pj3BXq6xxJQkhHzEbfUnI-3uhv7ptG3QO8tm1GGVYsudyztoEuQcNZCYMIKVoKOxEtu9iyIiSE72Q2HoRsjw0lca15SBiteW5ZZtw3Toj6aWM30n_ChKohbwmzTEhzdF8UtPamnS95T2_p24Q75O5436WCUMBXb7tEFZJzDjDw4Q6g9Obe7B1E_x-DVcnuiLIjuQUDa_XG9p) Peter, the 2020 Election has been a long journey for all of us. But it’s not over.
I assure you that now is NOT the time to stop fighting... You still have the opportunity to make a huge impact.
I’m counting on your support if we’re going to continue to defend and build up our majority. We need to be ready for anything.
**[Will you stand with me and keep the Senate red?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=1a485d5a209b46c0b4c3727893796954&_e=iKZPlkOpXPBdB7KzfyOYyE0yDqzx20yXeqp_cGW237jt9sJSL9kFVHHRARr1PjuShBGFoiSICcVrHxrsNFIWetg7r7r7Hvpx3ti7H3w2sH60bHX4mFerRyVhTGF_ApdfiUl9xnJM-I5d0cRZT9yHCGHS7RHGHShAKJvLD_2YqPsnWcyS9Rp9mDuyOO4EpQhYUGvx1TXRfWQISS8o9BKFjcbVirfmAtO-I-Y3DY7e25eE3TifhZZJ22Atz1kDHyqr-4RxPuNOS3EXIXZNi4A21D96gpagjdEFc7WnDvmzptygz-yagiieialIqhMMdJJiIL7lmRy1gfYrVQ6W0rKkrnHMryA9lW_4HMZZR4DbmXm-jKh3ZAvTbhNFewn0HwMfGd9Fm01CMnVuCkQRuemooLVy0yfKd2TATMgd2ZKLGyTlp8_HpLHvgKC_IHqdoO_m)**
Rob Portman | |

name: True the Vote
subject: A Call From President Trump: Resolute, Confident, Never Quit
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=324A745A20A3320)
---
| | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT
---
| | A Call From President Trump: Resolute, Confident, Never Quit

Catherine Engelbrecht on Conversation with Trump: Resolute, Confident, Never Quit
[Breitbart](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbSUyRnJhZGlvJTJGMjAyMCUyRjExJTJGMTglMkZjYXRoZXJpbmUtZW5nZWxicmVjaHQtb24tY29udmVyc2F0aW9uLXdpdGgtdHJ1bXAtcmVzb2x1dGUtY29uZmlkZW50LW5ldmVyLXF1aXQlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=324A745A20A3321)
Robert Kraychik
Nov. 18, 2020

"Catherine Engelbrecht, founder of True the Vote, told Breitbart News on Wednesday that President Donald Trump called her on Monday and was 'resolute' and 'confident' in a discussion regarding legal election battles.

"'I had the Incredible privilege of receiving a call from the president two days ago,' Englebrecht said on Wednesday’s edition of SiriusXM’s Breitbart News Daily with host Alex Marlow. 'It was quite a moment, and I will tell you all that it was the same resolute, confident, just energetic person that we see at those rallies, who was steadfast and focused.'

"Engelbrecht continued, 'We talked a lot about the ins and the outs of the election process and frustrations, but what I shared with him and what I remember as a takeaway from that moment is, I said, ‘Mr. President, you have given America back her heartbeat,’ and I hope that spoke to him, because it was sort of a word given to me in that moment and it seemed so appropriate.'
"'We talked about a lot of different potentials,' said Engelbrecht of her conversation with Trump.... 'I will say this, he was resolved, and we both echoed ‘never quit.'
"Engelbrecht continued, 'The message I want to share with everyone is to never quit. It is to believe and never quit, and that’s a powerful message coming from the commander of the free world.'...
"Engelbrecht remarked, 'There’s so much to be encouraged about in the days ahead because our eyes are wide open.'

"Engelbrecht said her organization had 'assembled a team of world class applied mathematicians [and] statisticians' including NSA alumni 'with really interesting ideas about how to read big data patterns' to examine elections in contested states."

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This year's Thanksgiving sacrifice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This will be hard -- but it will save lives.
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, Early this week, I made an incredibly tough decision. **Washington state is seeing daily COVID case counts increase significantly, with more than 2,000 cases per day over the weekend and average cases throughout the state doubling over the past two weeks. To keep citizens safe and to stop this escalation, I put in place a set of four-week statewide public health measures to slow the spread, not just in Washington but across the country.** We know the decisions we make here affect the rest of the United States, and we know that what we're facing here in Washington is not unique. Over the past week, the country has seen an average of nearly 160,000 COVID cases per day, an increase of nearly 80% from the average just two weeks ago. And sadly, we just passed a grim milestone as a country by surpassing more than 250,000 deaths from COVID-19. Now, we're a week away from Thanksgiving, one of our country's most treasured holidays and a time many of us normally gather close with our loved ones. This year will be different: Celebrations will have to be much smaller, and hundreds of thousands of tables will have empty chairs, signifying the grave losses we've endured this year. Trudi and I will be celebrating alone, checking in with loved ones virtually throughout the day and dinner. We sacrifice this year so we can have many more Thanksgivings in the years to come, and it's a sacrifice to not just protect our own families but our entire communities and country. Every single day medical advances are putting us closer to the light at the end of the tunnel. But I know this is hard -- I can't sugarcoat that. But if we make these sacrifices now, hopefully we'll be able to gather together safely once again next year, and we will have so much to be thankful for when everyone we love is at the holiday table. **Our public health measures in Washington state may not be the same where you are, but we think they're practical measures all Americans can follow.[Visit our COVID-19 response website to read more about how you can protect yourself and your loved ones this holiday season, no matter where you are.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13855?t=3&akid=8223%2E868730%2Ek-kBpJ)** I hope you stay safe this holiday season. I'm thankful for you and already looking forward to next year's Thanksgiving. Very truly yours, Jay
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Rhode Island on Pause
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Over the last two months, we've tried to be as targeted as possible in our restrictions, so that we could keep our economy open and keep Rhode Islanders safe. Unfortunately, what we've done to date hasn't been effective enough. I've done everything I could to avoid more severe restrictions because I know how hard it is for both people and businesses. But people aren't following the rules and we're left with no other options. So today, we announced both immediate changes to the current guidance and our plan for a two-week pause starting after Thanksgiving.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sx_527W_ElHV0xpXIqt2dvY9rS3KB8CUGvBT3JjxuAir-bB20cGfg4kxnMKOlnTj9R6-9B0XbbwixZ4BLSF0UFENVWBbHaSr9s83oFHmzpITraArC5JLCTuwL2y89iPs4RN9bxQji2ConBXWkjuqx8KRqap4E8WNUu0EC5ETD4Kx6-Wc57drgQ==&c=9Up5any1LDSdFCT2-k6FLqd7uwYfm0wFcapU1_XOK8lQUxZB7VXu6w==&ch=ch-6Fq-47EJs_OuKXkyH911SL1eH7PjgCvWn3Euj7BRSOsT09eycnw==)
---
| We're extending our current guidance -- including early closing times for bars and restaurants and capacity restrictions in venues and big box stores -- another week, through Sunday, November 29.
And for the next 10 days, we're making two additional changes:

1. Effective immediately, we're lowering the social gathering limit to a single household. This means you should not be spending time socially with anyone you don't live with in the next 10-days, including on Thanksgiving.
2. In addition to the stricter capacity limits on stores over 30,000 sq. ft., we're also requiring box stores to develop a plan for handling the increased volume of shoppers this season, including for Black Friday, and post that plan in the store.

Just after Thanksgiving, we'll be entering a two-week pause. This is the crux of our winter strategy. In just a two-week period, we have the ability to prevent overwhelming our hospital system without the need for a total lockdown. The image below lists the rules that will be in effect during the statewide pause from Monday, November 30 through Sunday, December 13.
---
|
---
| None of this is easy. I know how difficult it's going to be over the next few weeks, especially on Thanksgiving. But the loss of life we face if we don't follow the rules is far too great. If we take the next few weeks seriously and pause our activities and our social lives for a short time, then we can get through this without the need for a full lockdown.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sx_527W_ElHV0xpXIqt2dvY9rS3KB8CUGvBT3JjxuAir-bB20cGfg4kxnMKOlnTj9qbXTeiBEu8Z4DfqsfWLotK2M29dE7T33Ty9IyKg8dCr7u5mAWFABkidydchhyJklB1zzEkM3cvk543hBn5R-gBMVzmnbLKUGrGhPsUr2Y-7cYYpMmeHPNAOCPl9mhbm5opsfgRJQ0_AB63wFd0EWQ_g1TwN1qj5P21BYjOyl5qEiZ8AEyt-FK9H954BA4YZCjqMTBeJs6St_IBE0FujdDdiLhBye0wiupqwH3AjVrrMaTo1u2xbk_RZVnBUgOXULN_JY4DtthE=&c=9Up5any1LDSdFCT2-k6FLqd7uwYfm0wFcapU1_XOK8lQUxZB7VXu6w==&ch=ch-6Fq-47EJs_OuKXkyH911SL1eH7PjgCvWn3Euj7BRSOsT09eycnw==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, Over the last two months, we've tried to be as targeted as possible in our restrictions, so that we could keep our economy open and keep Rhode Islanders safe. Unfortunately, what we've done to date hasn't been effective enough. I've done everything I could to avoid more severe restrictions because I know how hard it is for both people and businesses. But people aren't following the rules and we're left with no other options. So today, we announced both immediate changes to the current guidance and our plan for a two-week pause starting after Thanksgiving. | == | We're extending our current guidance -- including early closing times for bars and restaurants and capacity restrictions in venues and big box stores -- another week, through Sunday, November 29. And for the next 10 days, we're making two additional changes: 1. Effective immediately, we're lowering the social gathering limit to a single household. This means you should not be spending time socially with anyone you don't live with in the next 10-days, including on Thanksgiving. 2. In addition to the stricter capacity limits on stores over 30,000 sq. ft., we're also requiring box stores to develop a plan for handling the increased volume of shoppers this season, including for Black Friday, and post that plan in the store. Just after Thanksgiving, we'll be entering a two-week pause. This is the crux of our winter strategy. In just a two-week period, we have the ability to prevent overwhelming our hospital system without the need for a total lockdown. The image below lists the rules that will be in effect during the statewide pause from Monday, November 30 through Sunday, December 13. | | None of this is easy. I know how difficult it's going to be over the next few weeks, especially on Thanksgiving. But the loss of life we face if we don't follow the rules is far too great. If we take the next few weeks seriously and pause our activities and our social lives for a short time, then we can get through this without the need for a full lockdown. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. body:
This will only take 30 seconds.
| Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because you signed up to receive emails that help elect Republicans. To update your email preferences, [click here](http://go.electrepublicans.org/email-pause-hcyg3zodnis23eo5gx58?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=1).
---
[ ](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?utm_campaign=an3_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amount=25&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=logo&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=2) [**RESPONSE REQUESTED:** What could we have done better in the 2020 election?](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?utm_campaign=an3_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amount=25&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=headline&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=3) Peter -- With the 2020 Election coming to a close, we’re taking a moment this afternoon to reflect on what’s worked (and what hasn’t). But we know well that Grassroots Republicans like you have a unique and critical perspective rooted in your local communities. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll take 30 seconds today to share your feedback with us. **[Please, Peter, let us know what you think. What could we have done better in the 2020 Elections? If you respond by midnight, we’ll share your feedback directly with our Executive Director.](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?utm_campaign=an3_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=text_text-hard-ask&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&address=&zip=34223&city=Englewood&employer_name=&occupation=&phone=&mobile=&oc=true&money_bomb=false&recurring=false&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=4)** | | [Share Your Feedback](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?utm_campaign=an3_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amount=5&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=btn-HD_EM_20201117_l36-amt-1&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=5)
---
Did we campaign enough in your community? Did we campaign there _too much_? Should we have focused on different issues? Etc.
Your perspective is _invaluable_ , Peter, as we wrap up the final vote counts and make plans for the upcoming Georgia Runoff Elections.
**Please, get back us right away. Share your feedback about how we could have performed better in the 2020 Elections.**
**[https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.electrepublicans.org/2020-election-feedback?utm_campaign=an3_p&utm_source=hddata&utm_medium=email&sc=hd&amt1=5&amt2=10&amt3=25&amt4=50&amt5=100&amt6=250&amt7=500&utm_content=text_text-base-url&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&address=&zip=34223&city=Englewood&employer_name=&occupation=&phone=&mobile=&oc=true&money_bomb=false&recurring=false&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=6)**
Thank you.
_\-- Elect Republicans_
