| | [](http://www.electrepublicans.org/?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=9) **Elect Republicans is a political action committee devoted to organizing Grassroots Republicans and connecting them directly to the battleground campaigns that need their help.**

_Elect Republicans (FEC ID #C00747170)
9648 Olive Blvd, Suite 300, St Louis, MO 63132, United States _

Emails like this are an essential part of our campaign, Peter! If we got your name or any information wrong, we apologize. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://go.electrepublicans.org/email-pause-hcyg3zodnis23eo5gx58?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=10). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://www.electrepublicans.org/unsubscribe?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=11). But keep in mind that if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay engaged with the Republican campaigns that you support.

Please send a personal check made payable to “Elect Republicans” to the address above to contribute by mail. Be sure to provide your full name, mailing address, email address, occupation, and employer with your mailed contribution.

Contributions to Elect Republicans are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections.

Federal law requires Elect Republicans to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

Contributions from individuals to Elect Republicans of up to $5,000 per year are designated to the Elect Republicans candidate contribution account. Any amount over $5,000 per year is designated to the Elect Republicans Carey account.

The use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder by Elect Republicans is for Elect Republicans’ political communication only. IN NO WAY does it indicate any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind.

By subscribing to our emails, you agree to our [Privacy Policy](http://www.electrepublicans.org/privacy?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an3_p&n=12).

clean_body: This will only take 30 seconds. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because you signed up to receive emails that help elect Republicans. To update your email preferences, . Peter -- With the 2020 Election coming to a close, we’re taking a moment this afternoon to reflect on what’s worked (and what hasn’t). But we know well that Grassroots Republicans like you have a unique and critical perspective rooted in your local communities. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll take 30 seconds today to share your feedback with us. | | Did we campaign enough in your community? Did we campaign there too much? Should we have focused on different issues? Etc. Your perspective is invaluable , Peter, as we wrap up the final vote counts and make plans for the upcoming Georgia Runoff Elections. Please, get back us right away. Share your feedback about how we could have performed better in the 2020 Elections. Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: 62 days until Day One
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Keep the momentum going.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=4502%2E53494%2ESM9KOE) Friend, Joe Biden will become President Biden in 62 days. He won the presidency by campaigning on bold climate action, specifically on building a just, inclusive clean energy economy. He'll take office with a considerable popular-vote victory and a mandate to deliver on that plan, starting on Day One in office. Evergreen is laying the groundwork for his administration to make that plan a reality. **Will you join us in loudly championing and pushing for Joe Biden's climate mandate from now until Day One, friend?** **[Donate by midnight on Monday to become an official Evergreen Day One Donor and receive your personalized Day One Membership Card!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1185?t=3&akid=4502%2E53494%2ESM9KOE)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1185?t=4&akid=4502%2E53494%2ESM9KOE) President-elect Biden has already committed to making important climate moves on Day One, including re-entering the Paris Agreement and reversing Donald Trump's 120+ environmental rollbacks. The months that follow will be critical to Biden's long-term success on climate and clean energy. Similarly, the next two months are crucial for us to keep up the momentum on Biden's climate mandate. **[Donate today to become a Day One Donor and power our work to put bold climate action at the top of our nation's agenda. We'll even send you a personalized Day One Membership Card!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1185?t=5&akid=4502%2E53494%2ESM9KOE)** Thanks for everything you've done -- from Evergreen's Day One to Biden's Day One. Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action | [DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1185?t=6&akid=4502%2E53494%2ESM9KOE)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Big Tech is Limiting Our Freedom of Speech!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2b892b9e5ce3407baadff5dcaace2ecd&_e=_TIEfZjnc51qlMmlLqayCmGSkpNwZ8ma72oXm0PfkoumuJM3HoZsA588nujQ4urwBOvWH92CbExP97obdj1kOrztDRF7vqnrPTZQq_gs6FJyK3taOagfdC0ft7H4DIsyQ9DD7MUaFlRAINS8kUhUeQQ1eqjMHBqMzooH8WVe3ZAHphcTCoSMScSMPZkZO7g-EutjpWRjEuuRzv8azadi_CJv7lllh45snMZ1dMxCHVg2GlJd4VCfVL6t7fFdSUQgHrmtGQhkEfcCrKTHz8RFxgCndCGob899WqmWGZZWYYCjcJWTZAopUqKGNIgok0aGZzaKGiLhthg1NlP7EZNTBfPjKDH6SzScSI-u-Rp4mQ0%3D) | |
---
Peter,
In case you missed it, I was on Fox News discussing the increasingly blatant overreach by Big Tech companies. _**Click the image below to watch a clip of my interview.**_
[ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2b892b9e5ce3407baadff5dcaace2ecd&_e=_TIEfZjnc51qlMmlLqayCoFUGclgiX1lwfkTc4GNf5p7nrN3hZa1j7TNR2w8Q9ZCDtx0dp2hjZrzCK2L_jFlkVnlVRGlBKaTTh9cUSc08dr3n2gDVotDc0whvjpOwsDmgJFQhLQqns-sJfjbkMu-j6m65ckGbfgavBVBfs_rIl1fgv0yspdvoRg2m382vCguHriaLpACToPDaewPP5K8uCL2erfs-KC9ZDw7jsALl_fjKPdFNj5fRLDCvo63AMUdG3ASadBu3QACUf0Q28YK4JqvlH4aNhQsmLPyR5nC3D1IIgt_MlGHBaZ0iv0IpDsaQjtvvaYZn6vCR-gsVo-OJxyr3tEd6JntkgTbP-RUP_4bkk8OZt_m-nrrHNUYK0US_8iN4EY7vQhd0hdtuYyrMKOa0eS0hZgyxpyqRMT14-4%3D)
|
---
A former Facebook employee contacted my office about an internal platform called “Tasks” that Facebook uses to coordinate projects, **including censorship.** Twitter and Google also share this same platform to censor language that “**they** ” — individuals who work for these giant technology corporations in Silicon Valley — deem harmful.

In other words, **Facebook, Twitter, and Google are all working together to control information and the free flow of ideas in this country** , and _they are primarily using it to suppress and censor conservatives who don’t agree with them!_ This is extremely dangerous, because **these are the largest corporations in the world!**

_**We cannot allow three businesses to control what we see, read, and hear every day.**_

In fact, _we can’t even advertise online about this critical issue because Facebook or Google will remove the content!_
[_**Stand Up; Fight Back for our First Amendment Right to Free Speech! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2b892b9e5ce3407baadff5dcaace2ecd&_e=_TIEfZjnc51qlMmlLqayCoFUGclgiX1lwfkTc4GNf5p7nrN3hZa1j7TNR2w8Q9ZCDtx0dp2hjZrzCK2L_jFlkVnlVRGlBKaTTh9cUSc08dr3n2gDVotDc0whvjpOwsDmgJFQhLQqns-sJfjbkMu-j6m65ckGbfgavBVBfs_rIl1fgv0yspdvoRg2m382vCguHriaLpACToPDaewPP5K8uNod1LynamXj4uHhn_0PPA6G931FMD4Bfp1s4yWSLpm7Bb38MxNclfLCjp77laLws7eLlQk7Cs2R86SqssXVvUzlGQxaQSFJJ_krClmDF2P56me6LRr96ZBCmhe_xrUv5jJ6lB98j-06e_Wc4MwrsJXzvCifC2qSlx6cSABqr-Nv9VxDxzlArMjdHVTvK9SP95HKNT9iK9aYFiN10dEGjPo%3D)
**We cannot allow a gang of Silicon Valley robber barons to censor American citizens because of their political beliefs.** This is Orwellian, and it damages our First Amendment right to free speech — a bedrock of our Constitution.

_**America’s Founding Fathers would roll over in their graves if they knew about the level of censorship that big tech is imposing on our society.**_

Please help us fight back against big tech censorship, their silencing of the conservative voice, and their disregard for our First Amendment before more Americans are influenced by their muffles.
[**Donate _HERE_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2b892b9e5ce3407baadff5dcaace2ecd&_e=_TIEfZjnc51qlMmlLqayCoFUGclgiX1lwfkTc4GNf5p7nrN3hZa1j7TNR2w8Q9ZCDtx0dp2hjZrzCK2L_jFlkVnlVRGlBKaTTh9cUSc08dr3n2gDVotDc0whvjpOwsDmgJFQhLQqns-sJfjbkMu-j6m65ckGbfgavBVBfs_rIl1fgv0yspdvoRg2m382vCguHriaLpACToPDaewPP5K8uNoyL65SlmIiKfOuzMi6hHvRnIgMHbDPF_r24X5ooOOy-pOXRR3CCasQTv97qwuJ6AzMvOtr9q9J7D8Fa9DpDuODV88lbShBZj0LiClB1hYFEqPCP00d3Z7naZwcS85euahLCew41mVrOphtUVML12ec_sPVwYTe95kkoQdQ1mPK6Aa9F6G42pNmBkN-FjFIODOEdsVxBNUP0L3wXSloDhU%3D)
Thank you,

Josh Hawley

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Singh=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Singh Rejects Murphy's Fear-Mongering; Urges New Jersey to Celebrate Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
"Tyrannical Phil Murphy has no right and no authority to cancel Thanksgiving or meddle in the Thanksgiving plans of New Jersey families," Singh said. | | | Dear Friend,

The radical left has finally lost it. More specifically, Tyrannical Phil Murphy has finally lost it.

It's not enough that we must be silenced (while they slander us). It's not enough that we must be disarmed (while they enjoy their security details). No, now we also can't see our loved ones.

Nothing gets me riled up more than corruption, but corruption that's designed to separate families during Thanksgiving? It would seem that Phil Murphy's hypocrisy knows no limits.

Well holiday or not, I won't stop fighting to restore New Jersey for the people. Phil Murphy can take his little shutdown and can it — I'll be with my family next week, eating turkey and laughing it up. I hope you will be too.

Take a moment to check out my team's press release below. It's only a sliver of what's in store for Tyrannical Phil Murphy. If you are able; help me fight with any contribution you can afford.

— Hirsh

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**

---
| |
# Singh Rejects Murphy's Fear-Mongering; Urges New Jersey to Celebrate Thanksgiving

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Conservative outsider, anti-establishment leader, and gubernatorial candidate Hirsh Singh today rejected Tyrannical Phil Murphy's new shutdown order canceling Thanksgiving for millions of New Jerseyans.

"Tyrannical Phil Murphy has no right and no authority to cancel Thanksgiving or meddle in the Thanksgiving plans of New Jersey families," Singh said.

In making his comments, Singh cited the unifying principle of recognizing a national day of thanks every year since the Civil War.

"It was President Lincoln who saw fit to proclaim a national day of Thanksgiving ending disparate thanksgiving celebrations on different days in different states," Singh said. "President Trump will once again proclaim the last Thursday in November to be our shared, national day of Thanksgiving. All Americans -- including New Jerseyans -- will come together with family, friends, and neighbors to celebrate our common appreciation for 'the gracious gifts of The Most High God' -- as Lincoln said -- at a time when a little national unity would do our country well.

"Phil Murphy's fear-mongering and insatiable appetite for central-planning cannot, should not and will not stop that."
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TO STOP TYRANNICAL PHIL MURPHY](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ac55d7e587&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE TO STOP TYRANNICAL PHIL MURPHY")
---
| ###

Thank you,
**The Singh for Governor Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Staff Academy
subject: “Staff Academy introduces you to a whole new community of people.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
Staff Academy Grad Samreena Farooqui and the digital track
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — Samreena Farooqui had a problem.

Like a lot of people, the 2016 presidential election left them wanting to work in politics, but they struggled to find their “in” to the political world.
Then they applied to Staff Academy.
Now Samreena works at a DC-based digital firm where they work on some of the organization's high-profile races.
[We spoke with Samreena recently about their time in the Staff Academy program, and asked what their advice is for folks who are thinking about applying. Check it out! ⤵️](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
| [](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
| [READ THE
INTERVIEW HERE](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
“On top of the skills I gained during Staff Academy, it’s an asset to have this network,” Samreena said when we asked how Staff Academy prepared them for advancing their career.
“I know as I progress, I have a whole group of people who want to see me succeed. I’m not going into anything alone.”
Samreena is right — Staff Academy is more than just an education in politics, it is a network of trained political professionals who work together, lift each other up, and help each other succeed.
And luckily, there’s still time for you to join this community!
Peter — Staff Academy applications are due by 11:59pm ET this Sunday, and if you’re interested in applying, we strongly recommend you finish your application as soon as possible.

[Here’s the best link.](https://t.dripemail2.)
| [APPLY NOW](https://t.dripemail2.)
---
— The Staff Academy Team

Thank you.

It’s been heartwarming to see all of the tremendous support across the Nation from great American Patriots, like YOU. Organic rallies have been springing up all over the Country in support of yours truly - incredible!

One thing has become clear these last few days, I am the American People’s ALL-TIME favorite President.

For years, the Democrats have been preaching how unsafe and RIGGED our Elections have been. Now, they are saying what a WONDERFUL job the Trump Administration did in making 2020 the most secure Election ever. Which is true, except for what the Left did: THEY RIGGED THE ELECTION!

I promise you we are fighting to ensure EVERY SINGLE LEGAL ballot is counted. I have legal teams on the ground in every critical state. All I need now is YOUR SUPPORT.
